allow: PowerShell($asm = [System.Reflection.Assembly]::LoadFile\("F:\\SteamLibrary\\steamapps\\common\\RimWorld\\RimWorldWin64_Data\\Managed\\Assembly-CSharp.dll"\); try { $types = $asm.GetTypes\(\) } catch [System.Reflection.ReflectionTypeLoadException] { $types = $_.Exception.Types | Where-Object { $_ -ne $null } }; $types | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "DebugAction" } | Select-Object FullName | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($asm = [System.Reflection.Assembly]::LoadFile\("F:\\SteamLibrary\\steamapps\\common\\RimWorld\\RimWorldWin64_Data\\Managed\\Assembly-CSharp.dll"\); try { $types = $asm.GetTypes\(\) } catch [System.Reflection.ReflectionTypeLoadException] { $types = $_.Exception.Types | Where-Object { $_ -ne $null } }; $da = $types | Where-Object { $_.FullName -eq "LudeonTK.DebugActionAttribute" }; "FIELDS:"; $da.GetFields\(\) | Select-Object Name, FieldType | Format-Table -AutoSize; "CTORS:"; $da.GetConstructors\(\) | ForEach-Object { \($_.GetParameters\(\) | ForEach-Object { $_.ParameterType.Name + ' ' + $_.Name }\) -join ', ' }; "AllowedGameStates:"; \($types | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq 'AllowedGameStates' }\).FullName)
